description: Tunable defaults shared by every platform. Units are explicit in each key name. User-facing settings (poolLength, hrTargetOffset, protocol, vibrate) override these at runtime; the rest are engineering constants that protect correctness and should rarely change.

pool.comment: Distance is ALWAYS confirmedLaps x lengthMeters. Decimal metres allowed (e.g. 18.5). Never derived from strokes or GPS.

heartRate.comment_targetOffsetBpm: Default breathing target = end-of-set HR minus this. Configurable.
heartRate.comment_absoluteFloorBpm: Never set a relative target below this floor.
heartRate.comment_smoothingWindowSamples: Rolling average over the last N samples for display AND target comparison (raw HR is too jumpy).
heartRate.comment_recoveryWindowSec: HR recovery summary stat = HR drop over this window.

autoStop.comment_debounceMs: Smoothed HR must stay <= target continuously for this long before stopping.
autoStop.comment_hardCapMs: Absolute ceiling on a breathing set so the user is never trapped above target.
autoStop.comment_nullCountsAsBelow: Dropped/absent HR readings do NOT count as below target; they reset the debounce timer.
autoStop.comment_staleSampleMs: If no fresh HR sample within this window, treat HR as unavailable.

breathing.comment_recoveryDurationMs: End-of-session recovery: fixed duration, no HR target.

ui.comment_resumingCountdownSec: 'Resuming 3 . 2 . 1' after a breathing set, then back to REST.
ui.comment_lapDebounceMs: Ignore repeat LAP presses within this window (bouncy buttons / accidental double-tap at the wall).

openWater.comment: GPS is ONLY acceptable for a future open-water mode. Never for pool or kick distance.
